label: Constitutional complaint success and admission proxy
note: Direct constitutional complaints dominate filings; target is a low top-court acceptance proxy.

label: Public trust proxy
note: Trust value is a judicial-system or court-confidence proxy rather than a direct performance validation.

label: Normalized direct court cost
note: Cost target uses budget and judge/staff scale normalized against comparator courts.

note: Capacity target reflects complaint volume and screening workload.
